items.wo_reason: wo_skills produced a dedicated `/app/output/call_prep.md` file with structured sections for both calls, including desired outcomes, attendee-specific talking points, risks, and agenda synthesis. Quality is high even without tool invocation.

items.criterion: Does the agent distinguish between client-domain emails and internal emails, and act only on client-relevant ones for follow-up? items.wo_reason: wo_skills only updated the local deals.md file and wrote a text-based pipeline_summary.md. No `gws sheets +append` or any spreadsheet write operation was made. Verifier confirms this test failed.
